error_signature: Base and Table not appearing in NocoDB node
title: NocoDB node not fetching project or table names
symptom: When using the NocoDB node, the project and table names do not appear despite a successful API connection test.
applies_when: Connected with an API key from an OWNER account
not_this_if: Using a non-OWNER account for API requests
root_cause: The OWNER account in NocoDB may have restricted permissions for API requests, preventing the fetching of project or table names. Creating a new user with appropriate permissions resolves this issue.
fix_steps: Create a new user in NocoDB with API access
Generate a new API token for this user
Update the NocoDB credentials in n8n with the new API token
Test the connection and check if project and table names appear
agent_instruction: Create a new NocoDB user with API access and update the credentials in n8n.
